name: COLOPL, Inc.
summary: COLOPL, Inc. provides mobile gaming applications for smartphones in Japan and internationally. The company provides services for virtual reality devices; location data analysis consulting services to governments and business corporations; and Smart Answer, a smartphone-specific research service. Its solutions cover video games and digital contents, and browser games for PCs and mobile phones. The company also involves in venture capital activities. COLOPL, Inc. was incorporated in 2008 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
